title: Trump administration is allegedly collecting $10 billion on the TikTok deal
summary: The Trump administration is reportedly collecting a $10 billion fee from investors including Oracle and Silver Lake for brokering the TikTok deal, with $2.5 billion already paid to the Treasury in January and the remainder coming in installments. This marks another instance of the administration directly profiting from private business negotiations.
content:
In September, Donald Trump claimed that "the United States is getting a tremendous fee" for brokering the TikTok deal. Now sources tell the Wall Street Journal and the New York Times that fee is expected to be in the range of $10 billion. The money is supposedly being paid by new investors, including Oracle and Silver Lake. Reports are that $2.5 billion was already paid to the Treasury when the deal closed on January 22nd. The rest will be paid out in installments.
This is the latest example of the Trump administration inserting itself into private business in unprecedented ways, including taking on a 10-percent stake in Intel last August,  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普政府据称从TikTok交易中收取100亿美元
zh.summary: 据报道，特朗普政府正在从包括甲骨文公司和银湖公司在内的投资者处收取100亿美元费用，作为促成TikTok交易的佣金。其中25亿美元已于1月支付给财政部，余款分期支付。这是该政府从私人商业谈判中直接获利的又一例证。

fr.title: L'administration Trump collecterait 10 milliards de dollars sur l'accord TikTok
fr.summary: Selon les rapports, l'administration Trump collecte actuellement une commission de 10 milliards de dollars auprès d'investisseurs, dont Oracle et Silver Lake, pour avoir négocié l'accord TikTok, 2,5 milliards de dollars ayant déjà été versés au Trésor en janvier et le reste étant versé par versements. Ceci marque un autre exemple de l'administration profitant directement des négociations commerciales privées.

de.title: Trump-Administration erhebt angeblich 10 Milliarden Dollar Gebühr für TikTok-Deal
de.summary: Die Trump-Administration kassiert Berichten zufolge eine Gebühr von 10 Milliarden Dollar von Investoren, darunter Oracle und Silver Lake, für die Vermittlung des TikTok-Deals, wobei 2,5 Milliarden Dollar bereits im Januar an die Staatskasse gezahlt wurden und der Rest in Raten bezahlt wird. Dies ist ein weiteres Beispiel dafür, dass die Administration direkt von privaten Geschäftsverhandlungen profitiert.

es.title: La administración Trump presuntamente está cobrando 10 mil millones de dólares en el acuerdo de TikTok
es.summary: Según informes, la administración Trump está cobrando una tarifa de 10 mil millones de dólares a inversores, incluyendo Oracle y Silver Lake, por mediar en el acuerdo de TikTok, con 2.500 millones de dólares ya pagados al Tesoro en enero y el resto en cuotas. Esto marca otro ejemplo de la administración obteniendo ganancias directas de negociaciones comerciales privadas.

title: The MacBook Neo is ‘the most repairable MacBook’ in years, according to iFixit
summary: Apple's new MacBook Neo is the company's most repairable laptop in approximately fourteen years, combining improved repairability with an affordable price point. This represents a significant shift in Apple's approach to hardware design and sustainability.
content: Apple’s new MacBook Neo isn’t just the most affordable MacBook — it’s also the company's most repairable laptop in “about fourteen years."

zh.title: 据iFixit称，MacBook Neo是多年来"最易修复的MacBook"
zh.summary: 苹果公司新推出的MacBook Neo是该公司大约十四年来最易修复的笔记本电脑，将改进的可维修性与实惠的价格相结合。这代表了苹果在硬件设计和可持续性方面方法的重大转变。

fr.title: Le MacBook Neo est le "MacBook le plus réparable" depuis des années, selon iFixit
fr.summary: Le nouveau MacBook Neo d'Apple est l'ordinateur portable le plus réparable de l'entreprise depuis environ quatorze ans, combinant une réparabilité améliorée avec un prix abordable. Cela représente un changement significatif dans l'approche d'Apple en matière de conception matérielle et de durabilité.

de.title: Das MacBook Neo ist das "reparaturfreundlichste MacBook" der letzten Jahre, laut iFixit
de.summary: Das neue MacBook Neo von Apple ist der reparaturfreundlichste Laptop des Unternehmens seit etwa vierzehn Jahren und verbindet verbesserte Reparierbarkeit mit einem erschwinglichen Preis. Dies stellt eine bedeutende Verschiebung in Apples Herangehensweise an Hardware-Design und Nachhaltigkeit dar.

es.title: El MacBook Neo es el "MacBook más reparable" en años, según iFixit
es.summary: El nuevo MacBook Neo de Apple es la computadora portátil más reparable de la empresa en aproximadamente catorce años, combinando una reparabilidad mejorada con un precio asequible. Esto representa un cambio significativo en el enfoque de Apple hacia el diseño de hardware y la sostenibilidad.

title: US Army announces contract with Anduril worth up to $20B
summary: The US Army announced a contract with defense technology company Anduril worth up to $20 billion, consolidating over 120 separate procurement actions into a single enterprise agreement. The consolidation represents a major restructuring of Army procurement practices.
content: The Army described this as a single enterprise contract consolidating more than 120 separate "procurement actions."

zh.title: 美国陆军宣布与Anduril公司签订价值高达200亿美元的合同
zh.summary: 美国陆军宣布与国防技术公司Anduril签订一份价值高达200亿美元的合同，将120多项单独的采购行动整合到一份企业协议中。这种整合代表了美国陆军采购惯例的重大重组。

fr.title: L'armée américaine annonce un contrat avec Anduril d'une valeur pouvant atteindre 20 milliards de dollars
fr.summary: L'armée américaine a annoncé un contrat avec la société de technologie de défense Anduril d'une valeur pouvant atteindre 20 milliards de dollars, consolidant plus de 120 actions d'approvisionnement distinctes en un seul accord d'entreprise. Cette consolidation représente une restructuration majeure des pratiques d'approvisionnement de l'armée.

de.title: US-Armee kündet Vertrag mit Anduril im Wert von bis zu 20 Milliarden Dollar an
de.summary: Die US-Armee gab einen Vertrag mit dem Rüstungstechnologieunternehmen Anduril im Wert von bis zu 20 Milliarden Dollar bekannt, der über 120 separate Beschaffungsmaßnahmen in ein einziges Unternehmensabkommen konsolidiert. Die Konsolidierung stellt eine große Umstrukturierung der Beschaffungspraktiken der Armee dar.

es.title: El Ejército de EE.UU. anuncia contrato con Anduril por hasta 20 mil millones de dólares
es.summary: El Ejército de EE.UU. anunció un contrato con la empresa de tecnología de defensa Anduril por un valor de hasta 20 mil millones de dólares, consolidando más de 120 acciones de adquisición separadas en un único acuerdo empresarial. La consolidación representa una reestructuración importante de las prácticas de adquisición del Ejército.

title: Meta is reportedly laying off up to 20 percent of its staff
summary: Meta is planning to lay off up to 20 percent of its workforce—approximately 15,800 employees—to offset massive spending on AI infrastructure and data centers. The potential cuts would be Meta's largest layoff event since November 2022, when the company eliminated 22,000 positions.
content:
According to Reuters, Meta is looking to offset spending on AI and data centers with a massive round of layoffs. Sources familiar with the matter say the company could lay off as much as 20 percent of its staff, eliminating roughly 15,800 positions. That would be the largest series of layoffs at the company since it terminated 22,000 workers over just a few months between November 2022 and early 2023.
Word of the potential downsizing comes after Meta signaled that it was all but giving up on VR and the Metaverse, slashing budgets and closing studios. Instead, the company has been spending big to attract AI talent, build data centers, and ac …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta据报将裁员至少20%
zh.summary: Meta计划裁减占员工队伍20%的员工——约15,800名员工——以抵消在AI基础设施和数据中心上的巨额支出。这次潜在的裁员将是Meta自2022年11月以来最大规模的裁员事件，当时公司解雇了22,000名员工。

fr.title: Meta réduirait son effectif de 20 pour cent
fr.summary: Meta envisage de réduire son effectif de 20 pour cent—environ 15 800 employés—pour compenser les dépenses massives en infrastructure IA et centres de données. Cette réduction potentielle serait le plus grand événement de licenciement chez Meta depuis novembre 2022, lorsque l'entreprise a supprimé 22 000 postes.

de.title: Meta reduziert Belegschaft angeblich um 20 Prozent
de.summary: Meta plant, bis zu 20 Prozent seiner Belegschaft zu entlassen—etwa 15.800 Mitarbeiter—um die massiven Ausgaben für KI-Infrastruktur und Rechenzentren auszugleichen. Die möglichen Kürzungen wären Metas größtes Entlassungsereignis seit November 2022, als das Unternehmen 22.000 Positionen abbaute.

es.title: Meta supuestamente despedirá al 20 por ciento de su personal
es.summary: Meta planea despedir hasta el 20 por ciento de su fuerza laboral—aproximadamente 15.800 empleados—para compensar los gastos masivos en infraestructura de IA y centros de datos. Los posibles recortes serían el evento de despidos más grande de Meta desde noviembre de 2022, cuando la empresa eliminó 22.000 puestos.

title: Honda is killing its EVs — and any chance of competing in the future
summary: Honda's decision to discontinue its three EV models for the U.S. market represents a significant setback in its electrification strategy. This move signals potential challenges for the automaker's ability to compete effectively in the rapidly growing electric vehicle market.
content: Honda's decision to kill its three EVs for the U.S. market will reverberate far beyond North America.

zh.title: 本田正在放弃电动车——以及与未来竞争的任何机会
zh.summary: 本田决定停产其在美国市场的三款电动汽车，代表了其电气化战略的重大挫折。这一举措表明该汽车制造商在快速增长的电动汽车市场中有效竞争的能力面临潜在挑战。

fr.title: Honda abandonne ses véhicules électriques — et toute chance de concurrence future
fr.summary: La décision de Honda d'arrêter ses trois modèles de véhicules électriques sur le marché américain représente un revers important dans sa stratégie d'électrification. Ce mouvement signale des défis potentiels pour la capacité du constructeur automobile à concourir efficacement sur le marché des véhicules électriques en croissance rapide.

de.title: Honda gibt seine Elektrofahrzeuge auf — und jede Chance, in der Zukunft zu konkurrieren
de.summary: Hondas Entscheidung, die Produktion seiner drei Elektrofahrzeugmodelle für den US-Markt einzustellen, stellt einen erheblichen Rückschlag in seiner Elektrifizierungsstrategie dar. Dieser Schritt signalisiert potenzielle Herausforderungen für die Fähigkeit des Autoherstellers, auf dem schnell wachsenden Markt für Elektrofahrzeuge effektiv zu konkurrieren.

es.title: Honda está eliminando sus vehículos eléctricos — y cualquier oportunidad de competir en el futuro
es.summary: La decisión de Honda de discontinuar sus tres modelos de vehículos eléctricos para el mercado estadounidense representa un retroceso significativo en su estrategia de electrificación. Este movimiento señala posibles desafíos para la capacidad del fabricante de automóviles de competir efectivamente en el mercado de vehículos eléctricos de rápido crecimiento.

title: Meta reportedly considering layoffs that could affect 20% of the company
summary: Meta is reportedly considering layoffs that could reduce its workforce by approximately 20%, with the cuts potentially helping offset the company's substantial spending on AI infrastructure and acquisitions. The proposed reductions come as the social media giant continues aggressive investment in artificial intelligence initiatives.
content: These layoffs could help Facebook's parent company offset its aggressive spending on AI infrastructure, as well as AI-related acquisitions and hiring.

zh.title: Meta据报道正在考虑裁员，可能影响公司20%的员工
zh.summary: Meta据报道正在考虑裁员，可能减少其劳动力约20%，这些裁员可能有助于抵消该公司在人工智能基础设施和收购上的巨额支出。据报道的减员正值这家社交媒体巨头继续积极投资人工智能计划之际。

fr.title: Meta envisagerait des licenciements qui pourraient affecter 20% de l'entreprise
fr.summary: Meta envisagerait des licenciements qui pourraient réduire sa main-d'œuvre d'environ 20%, les réductions contribuant potentiellement à compenser les dépenses substantielles de l'entreprise en infrastructure d'IA et acquisitions. Les réductions proposées arrivent alors que le géant des médias sociaux continue à investir agressivement dans les initiatives d'intelligence artificielle.

de.title: Meta erwägt Massenentlassungen, die 20% des Unternehmens betreffen könnten
de.summary: Meta erwägt Massenentlassungen, die seine Belegschaft um etwa 20% reduzieren könnten, wobei die Kürzungen möglicherweise die erheblichen Ausgaben des Unternehmens für KI-Infrastruktur und Übernahmen ausgleichen. Die vorgeschlagenen Reduzierungen erfolgen, während der Social-Media-Riese weiterhin aggressiv in Künstliche-Intelligenz-Initiativen investiert.

es.title: Meta supuestamente está considerando despidos que podrían afectar al 20% de la empresa
es.summary: Meta supuestamente está considerando despidos que podrían reducir su fuerza laboral aproximadamente 20%, con los recortes potencialmente ayudando a compensar el gasto sustancial de la empresa en infraestructura de IA y adquisiciones. Las reducciones propuestas llegan mientras el gigante de las redes sociales continúa invirtiendo agresivamente en iniciativas de inteligencia artificial.

title: As people look for ways to make new friends, here are the apps promising to help
summary: A new generation of friendship apps, including platforms like BFF and Timeleft, are helping users connect with potential friends through dedicated discovery and event-focused features. These applications represent a growing market for social connection tools targeting people seeking to expand their social circles.
content: We've compiled a list of friendship apps, from friend discovery platforms like BFF to event-focused ones like Timeleft.

zh.title: 随着人们寻找交朋友的方式，这些应用承诺提供帮助
zh.summary: 包括BFF和Timeleft等平台在内的新一代友谊应用正在帮助用户通过专门的发现和以活动为中心的功能与潜在朋友联系。这些应用代表了针对寻求扩展社交圈子的人群的社交联系工具的不断增长的市场。

fr.title: Alors que les gens cherchent des moyens de se faire de nouveaux amis, voici les applications qui promettent d'aider
fr.summary: Une nouvelle génération d'applications d'amitié, y compris des plates-formes comme BFF et Timeleft, aide les utilisateurs à se connecter avec des amis potentiels grâce à des fonctionnalités de découverte dédiées et axées sur les événements. Ces applications représentent un marché en croissance pour les outils de connexion sociale ciblant les personnes cherchant à élargir leur cercle social.

de.title: Da Menschen nach Möglichkeiten suchen, neue Freunde zu machen, finden Sie hier die Apps, die versprechen zu helfen
de.summary: Eine neue Generation von Freundschafts-Apps, einschließlich Plattformen wie BFF und Timeleft, hilft Benutzern, sich mit potenziellen Freunden durch dedizierte Entdeckungs- und Ereignis-fokussierte Funktionen zu verbinden. Diese Anwendungen stellen einen wachsenden Markt für Social-Connection-Tools dar, die auf Menschen abzielen, die ihren sozialen Kreis erweitern möchten.

es.title: A medida que las personas buscan formas de hacer nuevos amigos, aquí están las aplicaciones que prometen ayudar
es.summary: Una nueva generación de aplicaciones de amistad, incluidas plataformas como BFF y Timeleft, están ayudando a los usuarios a conectarse con posibles amigos a través de funciones dedicadas de descubrimiento y enfocadas en eventos. Estas aplicaciones representan un mercado creciente para herramientas de conexión social dirigidas a personas que buscan expandir sus círculos sociales.

title: Hulu, Disney Plus, and the Pixel Watch 4 are among this week’s best deals
summary: This week's notable tech deals include a significant discount on the Hulu and Disney Plus ad-supported bundle, now available for $4.99 per month through March 24th, alongside $60 off Google's Pixel Watch 4. The deals also encompass savings on other consumer electronics and devices.
content:
Happy Saturday, all! This week, we found a number of deals that should help you unwind and relax over the next few days (and beyond). If you’re planning to stream the Oscars on Sunday, there’s still time to take advantage of a great deal on Hulu and Disney Plus, as well as Google’s latest 4K streaming device. Speaking of Google, you can also currently save $60 on the Pixel Watch 4; there are also savings to be had on microSD Express cards, ice cream makers, and a host of other great tech this weekend. So, without further ado, let’s get to it.
Hulu and Disney Plus recently launched a terrific promo that drops the price of the ad-supported bundle for new and returning subscribers to just $4.99 a month ($8 off) through 11:59AM ET on March 24th. That’s the best deal we’ve seen on the bundle since Black Friday and Cyber Monday, and a great way to stream the 98th Academy Awards without paying full price when they air tomorrow, March 15th, at 7PM ET.
In addition to the aforementioned awards show, Disney’s discounted bundle lets you catch up on 2026 nominees like The Secret Agent, It Was Just An Accident, and Elio. You also get access to the rest of Hulu and Disney’s massive catalog of movies and TV shows, which includes everything from Predator: Badlands and Anora to both seasons of Andor and the upcoming second season of Daredevil: Born Again.
Disney Plus, Hulu Bundle (with ads)

Where to Buy:

 $12.99 $4.99 at Disney Plus (monthly)

If you want a terrific Android smartwatch to keep tabs on your health and fitness goals, the Google Pixel Watch 4 is down to a new low price. You can currently pick up the Wi-Fi-enabled 41mm model for $289.99 ($60 off) at Amazon and Best Buy, or the larger 45mm variant for $339.99 (also $60 off) via the same retailers (Amazon / Best Buy).
Google’s latest wearable offers a wide range of helpful health and fitness tools, allowing you to track your activity, sleep, blood oxygen levels, and heart rate. It can automatically record certain cardio w

zh.title: Hulu、Disney Plus和Pixel Watch 4是本周最佳交易
zh.summary: 本周的科技交易包括Hulu和Disney Plus广告支持套餐的大幅折扣，现在可以以每月4.99美元的价格享受至3月24日，加上谷歌Pixel Watch 4优惠60美元。这些交易还包括其他消费电子产品和设备的优惠。

Les offres englobent également des économies sur d'autres appareils et produits électroniques de consommation.

de.title: Hulu, Disney Plus und die Pixel Watch 4 gehören zu den besten Angeboten dieser Woche
de.summary: Zu den bemerkenswerten Tech-Angeboten dieser Woche gehört ein erheblicher Rabatt auf das werbegestützte Hulu- und Disney Plus-Paket, das jetzt ab 4,99 $ pro Monat bis zum 24. März verfügbar ist, sowie 60 $ Rabatt auf Googles Pixel Watch 4. Die Angebote umfassen auch Einsparungen bei anderen Unterhaltungselektronik- und Geräten.

es.title: Hulu, Disney Plus y Pixel Watch 4 están entre las mejores ofertas de esta semana
es.summary: Las ofertas tecnológicas notables de esta semana incluyen un descuento significativo en el paquete compatible con anuncios de Hulu y Disney Plus, ahora disponible por $4.99 por mes hasta el 24 de marzo, junto con $60 de descuento en el Pixel Watch 4 de Google. Las ofertas también incluyen ahorros en otros productos electrónicos de consumo y dispositivos.

title: Prediction markets want the Oscars to be your gateway drug to betting on everything
summary: Prediction market platforms like Polymarket are partnering with major entertainment events, including the Oscars, to introduce mainstream audiences to speculative trading. These collaborations signal how prediction markets are expanding beyond traditional betting into mainstream entertainment and cultural events.
content:
Though it was weird to see the Golden Globes partner with Polymarket for its most recent awards show, the collaboration wasn't shocking given the way that people have begun using prediction markets to gamble on basically anything. Prediction markets are being used to bet on everything from when wars might break out to who will win the Nobel Peace Prize, so why wouldn't people also be interested in placing wagers on more entertaining and less consequential things, like celebrities' chances of winning industry accolades?
But this "everything is gambling" culture has given prediction market firms an opportunity to insert themselves into other  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 预测市场想让奥斯卡成为你参与各种博彩的入门
zh.summary: Polymarket等预测市场平台正在与包括奥斯卡在内的主要娱乐活动合作，向主流观众介绍投机交易。这些合作表明预测市场如何超越传统博彩扩展到主流娱乐和文化活动。

fr.title: Les marchés prédictifs veulent que les Oscars soient votre porte d'entrée aux paris sur tout
fr.summary: Les plateformes de marché prédictif comme Polymarket s'associent à de grands événements de divertissement, y compris les Oscars, pour introduire un public grand public à la spéculation boursière. Ces collaborations signalent comment les marchés prédictifs s'étendent au-delà des paris traditionnels vers le divertissement grand public et les événements culturels.

de.title: Vorhersagemärkte wollen, dass die Oscars Ihr Einstiegstor zum Wetten auf alles sind
de.summary: Vorhersagemarktplattformen wie Polymarket arbeiten mit großen Unterhaltungsereignissen, einschließlich der Oscars, zusammen, um Mainstream-Publikum in den spekulativen Handel einzuführen. Diese Kooperationen signalisieren, wie Vorhersagemärkte über traditionelle Glücksspiele hinaus in Mainstream-Unterhaltung und Kulturveranstaltungen expandieren.

es.title: Los mercados de predicción quieren que los Oscars sean tu puerta de entrada a las apuestas en todo
es.summary: Las plataformas de mercado de predicción como Polymarket se asocian con eventos principales de entretenimiento, incluyendo los Oscars, para introducir a audiencias convencionales al comercio especulativo. Estas colaboraciones señalan cómo los mercados de predicción se están expandiendo más allá de las apuestas tradicionales hacia el entretenimiento convencional y eventos culturales.

title: MacBook Air M5 review: a small update for the ‘just right’ Mac
summary: Apple's 2026 MacBook Air update includes the M5 chip, Wi-Fi 7 support, and increased base storage of 512GB, though these incremental improvements come with a $100 price increase. The introduction of the lower-cost MacBook Neo creates clearer product differentiation while maintaining the Air's position as a premium portable computer.
content:
Neo to the left of me. Pros are to the right. | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

Not much has changed in the new MacBook Air for 2026: It now has the M5 chip, Wi-Fi 7, and faster storage starting at 512GB instead of 256GB. It's just as outstanding a computer as last year's model, even if it's a shame it's $100 more expensive. 
The bigger change has happened to the Air. The MacBook Neo now exists, and it's an awesome little computer for $500 less than the base 13-inch Air. The Neo's existence doesn't invalidate the Air or make it pointless, and I doubt the Neo will cannibalize too much of the Air's sales. The Air is a more capable, faster, and sleeker machine. Having the Neo sit beneath it does paint it in a new light, t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: MacBook Air M5评测：对"恰到好处"Mac的小更新
zh.summary: 苹果2026年MacBook Air更新包括M5芯片、Wi-Fi 7支持和512GB的基础存储增加，尽管这些增量改进伴随着100美元的价格上升。更便宜的MacBook Neo的推出创造了更清晰的产品差异化，同时保持了Air作为高端便携式计算机的地位。

fr.title: Examen du MacBook Air M5 : une petite mise à jour pour le Mac « juste bon »
fr.summary: La mise à jour du MacBook Air 2026 d'Apple inclut la puce M5, la prise en charge du Wi-Fi 7 et un stockage de base augmenté de 512 Go, bien que ces améliorations supplémentaires s'accompagnent d'une augmentation de prix de 100 $. L'introduction du MacBook Neo moins cher crée une différenciation de produit plus claire tout en maintenant la position de l'Air en tant qu'ordinateur portable haut de gamme.

de.title: MacBook Air M5 Bewertung: Ein kleines Update für den „genau richtigen" Mac
de.summary: Apples MacBook Air Update 2026 umfasst den M5-Chip, Wi-Fi 7-Unterstützung und erhöhten Basisspeicher von 512 GB, obwohl diese inkrementellen Verbesserungen mit einer Preiserhöhung von 100 $ verbunden sind. Die Einführung des kostengünstigeren MacBook Neo schafft eine klarere Produktdifferenzierung und behält Airs Position als Premium-Laptop bei.

es.title: Revisión de MacBook Air M5: una pequeña actualización para el Mac "justo"
es.summary: La actualización de MacBook Air 2026 de Apple incluye el chip M5, compatibilidad con Wi-Fi 7 y almacenamiento base aumentado de 512 GB, aunque estas mejoras incrementales vienen con un aumento de precio de $100. La introducción del MacBook Neo más económico crea una diferenciación de producto más clara mientras mantiene la posición del Air como una computadora portátil premium.

title: A Scavengers Reign artist explores contemplative sci-fi in new comics
summary: Animator Jonathan Djob Nkondo, recognized for his work on the animated series Scavengers Reign, is re-releasing his self-published graphic novels exploring contemplative science fiction themes and alien worlds. The re-release reintroduces audiences to the artist's foundational visual storytelling before his animation career prominence.
content:
You may recognize Jonathan Djob Nkondo's work from animated projects like the surreal sci-fi series Scavengers Reign or the recent Gorillaz short film The Mountain, The Moon Cave and The Sad God. But before that the French artist and animator made self-published comics that depicted strange alien worlds and future societies. Now he's revisiting that work with a lush release of two graphic novels. "I think most of the people who follow my work don't necessarily know that I published comics," Nkondo tells The Verge. "I am mainly known for my work in animations, so revisiting those books and promoting them again was a good way to spread the wor …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Asus’ new open earbuds are a wonderful companion for handheld gaming
summary: Asus' Cetra Open Wireless earbuds feature an open-style design specifically optimized for handheld gaming, offering immersive sound without blocking environmental awareness. The earbuds include a premium USB-C transmitter with passthrough charging capability, making them particularly suited for extended gaming sessions on devices like the Steam Deck and Nintendo Switch 2.
content:
They look like your average open earbuds, but with optional RGB LED effects. | Photo by Cameron Faulkner / The Verge	

The Cetra Open Wireless aren’t like most other gaming earbuds. They’re large, with an open-style design that rests just outside of your ears, letting game audio mix with sounds in your environment. These allow for immersion, but only if your environment is quiet enough. And turning them up might let those nearby hear what you’re listening to.
Even if you love open-style headphones as much as I do, you will probably agree that they are not the best choice for every listening scenario or all people. However, the Cetra Open are some of the most comfortable and feature-packed gaming earbuds I’ve tried, and the sound quality — while lacking in bass compared to earbuds that get a tight seal — leaves little to be desired. Plus, they ship with the best USB-C 2.4GHz audio transmitter available, one with a passthrough USB-C port that lets you charge your device or an accessory as you listen.
Asus Cetra Open Wireless earbuds

Where to Buy:

 $229.99 at Amazon
 $229.99 at Newegg
 $229.99 at Asus

Before I started testing the Cetra Open, I spent most of my time alternating between the SteelSeries Arctis Buds and Sony InZone Buds while gaming, both of which come with active noise cancellation, a snug fit, good sound, and USB-C transmitters of varying sizes that make listening to games on my Steam Deck and Nintendo Switch 2 a breeze. However, I didn’t consider switching back to either once I started using the Cetra Open for numerous reasons. I’ve been playing Silent Hill F and Esoteric Ebb on my Steam Deck without feeling like I missed out on their phenomenal sound design. They work great with my PlayStation 5, too.








I imagine several companies wish they had been the first to make the USB-C transmitter that Asus packages with the Cetra Open, as it elevates them to a must-own gadget if you play a lot of games on handhelds like the Switch 2 or Steam Deck. The

zh.title: 华硕新开放式耳塞是手持游戏的绝佳伴侣

title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra review: show off
summary: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra offers privacy features that address consumer concerns about screen visibility in public spaces. The phone provides relief from the unease many users feel when using their devices in crowded environments. These privacy-focused features address a problem many users have internalized but not fully recognized.
content:
A notable phone.	

"Someone might be watching everything I'm doing on my screen," I tell myself in public. Even when I'm doing nothing of consequence - just making my little Wordle guesses - there's a sense of unease that stays with me. 
It's never bothered me too much, and I generally save the sensitive stuff like banking for when I'm home, but I realize it's a feeling I've internalized whenever I'm on my phone in a crowded place. Using Samsung's Galaxy S26 Ultra for the past couple of weeks has offered some relief from that particular worry simmering in the back of my mind; it solves a problem I didn't even fully recognize until I started using it in my dai …
Read the full story at The Verge.

content:
I just got back from the GDC Festival of Gaming, a big industry-focused event in San Francisco that was formerly known as the Game Developers Conference. While the show is mostly about educational sessions and networking opportunities for working developers, there were also a bunch of games that I got to play. Here are some of my favorites, listed alphabetically. Best of all, these could all launch this year - hopefully well before Grand Theft Auto VI.
At Fate's End

At Fate's End is a gorgeous new action-adventure game from Spiritfarer developer Thunder Lotus all about grappling with sibling relationships through exploration and battles. I …

title: European retailers yank popular headphones after study reports trace amounts of hormone-disrupting chemicals
summary: European retailers have pulled popular headphones from shelves following an EU-funded study that detected hormone-disrupting chemicals in major brands including Apple, Beats, Samsung, and Bose. The study analyzed 81 different headphone models and found all contained at least trace amounts of harmful chemicals. The action reflects growing consumer and regulatory concerns about chemical safety in consumer electronics.
content:
Some European retailers have stopped selling certain headphones after an EU-funded study found that they contained hormone-disrupting chemicals. 
The study included leading brands such as Apple, Beats, Samsung, Bose, JBL, and Sennheiser. Online stores Bol.com, Coolblue, and Mediamarkt didn't respond to inquiries from The Verge about which headphones they pulled, but local news outlets report that they're among the retailers that have decided to yank some of the worst-scoring models off the market.  
The study authors analyzed 81 different types of headphones, and found that all of them contained at least traces of harmful chemicals includi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 欧洲零售商下架流行耳机，研究发现含有荷尔蒙干扰物
zh.summary: 在一项欧盟资助的研究发现主要品牌（包括苹果、Beats、三星和Bose）含有荷尔蒙干扰物质后，欧洲零售商纷纷下架流行耳机。该研究分析了81款不同的耳机型号，发现所有产品都含有至少微量的有害化学物质。这一行动反映了消费者和监管机构对消费类电子产品化学安全的日益关注。

fr.title: Les détaillants européens retirent les écouteurs populaires après l'étude signalant des traces de perturbateurs endocriniens
fr.summary: Les détaillants européens ont retiré les écouteurs populaires des rayons suite à une étude financée par l'UE qui a détecté des perturbateurs endocriniens dans les principales marques, notamment Apple, Beats, Samsung et Bose. L'étude a analysé 81 modèles d'écouteurs différents et a constaté que tous contenaient au moins des traces de produits chimiques nocifs. Cette action reflète les préoccupations croissantes des consommateurs et des régulateurs concernant la sécurité chimique dans les appareils électroniques grand public.

de.title: Europäische Einzelhandelsketten ziehen beliebte Kopfhörer aus dem Handel nach Studie über hormonelle Störstoffe
de.summary: Europäische Einzelhandelsketten haben beliebte Kopfhörer aus den Regalen genommen, nachdem eine von der EU finanzierte Studie hormonelle Störstoffe in großen Marken wie Apple, Beats, Samsung und Bose entdeckte. Die Studie analysierte 81 verschiedene Kopfhörermodelle und stellte fest, dass alle mindestens Spuren von schädlichen Chemikalien enthielten. Diese Maßnahme spiegelt wachsende Bedenken von Verbrauchern und Aufsichtsbehörden hinsichtlich der chemischen Sicherheit von Unterhaltungselektronik wider.

es.title: Minoristas europeos retiran auriculares populares tras estudio que reporta cantidades traza de químicos disruptores endocrinos
es.summary: Los minoristas europeos han retirado auriculares populares de sus estantes después de un estudio financiado por la UE que detectó químicos disruptores endocrinos en marcas importantes, incluyendo Apple, Beats, Samsung y Bose. El estudio analizó 81 modelos de auriculares diferentes y encontró que todos contenían al menos cantidades traza de químicos nocivos. Esta acción refleja las crecientes preocupaciones de los consumidores y reguladores sobre la seguridad química en la electrónica de consumo.

title: NASA officials sidestepped questions on Artemis II risks—there's a reason why
summary: NASA officials avoided directly addressing safety concerns about the Artemis II lunar mission during recent questioning, raising transparency questions about the program's risk management as the agency prepares for human spaceflight.
content: "This ought to make for some good reading," NASA's mission management team chair said.

es.summary: xAI está revampando su esfuerzo de herramienta de codificación de IA y reclutando dos nuevos ejecutivos de Cursor. El movimiento señala una iteración continua en el competitivo panorama del desarrollo de IA.

title: Lawyer behind AI psychosis cases warns of mass casualty risks
summary: A lawyer representing AI-related harm victims warns that chatbots are now appearing in mass casualty cases, with technology advancing faster than safety safeguards. The warning raises concerns about liability and systemic AI risks.
content: AI chatbots have been linked to suicides for years. Now one lawyer says they are showing up in mass casualty cases too, and the technology is moving faster than the safeguards.

zh.title: 代表人工智能精神病案例的律师警告大规模伤亡风险
zh.summary: 代表与AI相关伤害受害者的律师警告，聊天机器人现在出现在大规模伤亡案例中，技术发展速度超过了安全保障措施。这一警告引发了对责任和系统性AI风险的担忧。

fr.title: L'avocat des cas de psychose liée à l'IA avertit des risques de pertes en masse
fr.summary: Un avocat représentant les victimes de préjudices liés à l'IA avertit que les chatbots apparaissent maintenant dans les cas de pertes en masse, la technologie avançant plus rapidement que les mesures de sécurité. L'avertissement soulève des préoccupations concernant la responsabilité et les risques systémiques de l'IA.

de.title: Anwalt hinter KI-Psychose-Fällen warnt vor Massenopfern-Risiken
de.summary: Ein Anwalt, der KI-bezogene Schadensersatzfälle vertritt, warnt davor, dass Chatbots jetzt in Massenopferfällen auftauchen, wobei die Technologie schneller voranschreitet als Sicherheitsmaßnahmen. Die Warnung wirft Fragen zur Haftung und systemischen KI-Risiken auf.

es.title: Abogado detrás de casos de psicosis por IA advierte sobre riesgos de bajas masivas
es.summary: Un abogado que representa a víctimas de daños relacionados con IA advierte que los chatbots ahora aparecen en casos de bajas masivas, con la tecnología avanzando más rápido que los sistemas de seguridad. La advertencia genera preocupaciones sobre responsabilidad y riesgos sistémicos de IA.
